title: Manaita
description: This is a complete remake of "Manaita".It can amplify crafting results by up to 32x.
body:
# Manaita Mod

Manaita Mod is a modern recreation of a classic-style overpowered crafting mod.

It adds a set of upgradeable Manaita boards that increase crafting multipliers far beyond normal vanilla balance, letting players push ordinary recipes into increasingly exaggerated output as they progress from wood to diamond. This mod is designed for players who enjoy nostalgic, intentionally unbalanced gameplay built around large crafting multipliers and fast material growth.

![A showcase image of all 5 Manaita board tiers placed side by side: wooden, stone, iron, gold, and diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/523003cf17448408fcd7ac56b03e5bc535565254.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>日本語での説明 / Japanese Description</summary>

## このMODについて

Manaita Mod(まな板Mod)は、昔懐かしい旧作まな板MODの体験を再現したものです。

木・石・鉄・金・ダイヤの5段階のまな板を追加し、通常のクラフトレシピの結果を数倍〜数十倍に増幅します。例えば、ダイヤのまな板では1回のクラフトで32個のアイテムが産出されます。

### 特徴

- **5段階のまな板**: 木(2x) → 石(4x) → 鉄(8x) → 金(16x) → ダイヤ(32x)
- **まな板な板材**: オークの板材を破壊すると確率でまな板な板材がドロップ
- **派手な成長**: クラフト結果が爆発的に増加する、意図的にバランスを崩したゲームプレイ
- **まな板用フック**: やっぱりまな板は壁に立て掛けてないとね！やっぱまな板って断崖絶ｐ((殴

### 進行ルート

1. オークの板材を破壊してまな板な板材を入手
2. 板材から木のまな板を作成
3. 素材を集めて上位のまな板へアップグレード
4. 最終的にダイヤのまな板(32x)を作成

</details>


## What This Mod Adds

- 5 Manaita board tiers:
  - `wooden`
  - `stone`
  - `iron`
  - `gold`
  - `diamond`
- A special progression item: `plate`
- Tier-by-tier upgrade recipes from lower boards to higher boards
- Increasing crafting multipliers based on board tier
- Configurable drop replacement used to obtain `plate`

## Crafting Multipliers

Each Manaita board increases the crafting multiplier:

- `wooden`: `2x`
- `stone`: `4x`
- `iron`: `8x`
- `gold`: `16x`
- `diamond`: `32x`

The core appeal of the mod is simple: the better your board, the higher your crafting multiplier becomes. Early tiers already improve production, while higher tiers push crafting into a much more excessive and overpowered style of progression.

![An image showing a Diamond Manaita turning a diamond block into diamonds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781a7f2641831b29d8116418d96cc5b76fab4ba2.png)

## Progression

Manaita Mod is built around straightforward, satisfying escalation.

You begin with the lower Manaita tiers, gather the materials needed to upgrade them, and unlock increasingly stronger crafting multipliers as you move upward through stone, iron, gold, and diamond. This creates a clear progression path where each upgrade noticeably changes how much value you get from ordinary crafting recipes.

## `plate` and Drop Behavior

`plate` is a key item in the Manaita progression system.

By default, it is obtained through configurable drop replacement. When breaking `Oak Planks`, the normal drop can be replaced with `plate` based on the following setting:

- `plateDropChance`: `0.125`

![An image showing Oak Planks being broken and `plate` appearing as the drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cfa68cef9b9b3287b8a153edefcdf51bff0b555.jpeg)

## Project Goal

This project aims to recreate the feel of the original Manaita-style experience for modern Minecraft: a progression-based crafting mod centered on unusually large crafting multipliers, fast resource growth, and intentionally exaggerated progression.
